results.title: Great fit at the armholes
results.reviewText: I like the colour. The top fits great at the top, love that the armholes are not too big, they are perfect. I wish the top had more of a swing shape to it. Many women my age (63) enjoy a little looser around the tummy and hips.  This has a slight flare but would be so lovely if it had more. I am keeping it because I need some tank tops for the summer but I sure wish someone would come out with some lovely swing tanks, short sleeves and long sleeves:)

luluResponse.responseText: We hear your thoughts on the Sculpt Tank Top Pleated, and we understand you'd like to see a more flowy and loose fit. If you’d like to explore other tank top options, our Product Experts would be happy to provide recommendations. You can connect with them through our "Contact Us" page.

results.title: Not the same fit as it used to be
results.reviewText: I have loved the sculpt tanks of rmany years, but this recent fit just doesn't fit the same as it used to. I ordered the size I always wear (ordered 4 different colors) and they didn't fit. Went to a store to get a bigger size and realized the fit had changed. Please bring back the vented back ones! They were the best!

results.title: Not as good as they used to be!
results.reviewText: I have loved these tops in the past but since they changed them I dont like them as much. I miss the open section in the back but more than that, ive worn my newest shirt twice and the stitching at the bottom has started to fray. I will be making a claim but as we live 5 hours from the nearest store, it is a hassle to have to deal with a return.

luluResponse.responseText: Thanks for reaching out about your Sculpt Tank Top Pleated—we know that stitching coming undone isn't ideal. Quality is the heart of what we do, and we'd love to know what's going on in more detail. For more information about our Quality Promise, check out 'Our Quality Promise' page on our website.

results.title: Why do the change the design??
results.reviewText: I loved the older sculpt tanks.  These newer ones have the pleat and puff out - very unflattering.  I always wore the same size and these newer ones are huge.  I feel like it looks like a tent.

luluResponse.responseText: Thank you for sharing your thoughts on the Sculpt Tank Top. Your feedback is invaluable in helping us shape our products, and we truly appreciate you taking the time to share it. If you'd like to discuss sizing or alternate styles, our Product Experts are here to help. To get the conversation started, visit our 'Virtual Shopping' page.

results.title: Tight around neck
results.reviewText: Little tight around neck for my like but still works
results.incentivizedReviewLabel: Received free product or lululemon affiliate

luluResponse.responseText: Thanks for sharing your experience with the Sculpt Tank Top. We're glad it's still working well for you, even if the neckline feels a little snug. If you enjoy the silhouette and are looking for a softer feel with a bit more stretch through the neckline, the Jersey Training Tank Top may be worth exploring. We appreciate you taking the time to share your feedback and will keep it in mind as we continue to evolve our designs.

results.title: Arm holes too big
results.reviewText: Why are the armpits so big....

luluResponse.responseText: Thank you for letting us know that the Sculpt Tank Top has room left to improve further.

results.title: Size 14 tank
results.reviewText: Perfect in weight.  Great for sweaty workout, however gapes under the arm

luluResponse.responseText: We’re glad you’re enjoying the Sculpt Tank Top, especially for sweaty workouts and its lightweight feel. We also really appreciate your note about the arm gaping—that’s helpful feedback and will be shared with our design team.

results.title: Love this tank but not the same as before
results.reviewText: I have one from a previous purchase and liked it very much.  I purchased 2 more but noticed that the fabric is thinner.  Did the fabric change?

results.title: Not true to size
results.reviewText: I have loved the sculpt tank in the past. Really liked the new look and color of this one and am so disappointed in the fit. Runs so much bigger, the arm holes are huge. Don’t make the same mistake I did and make sure to try it on first

luluResponse.responseText: We appreciate you sharing your feedback about the fit and armhole design. We know how important having a fit you love is and your insights help us improve your experience. If you're looking for a similar style you can check out our License to Train Classic-Fit Tank Top—it has the same easy fit that floats away from your body and is made with our No-Stink Zinc™ fabric. To explore other options and find a fit you love you can visit us in-store or connect with our Product Experts via the Contact Us page online.

results.title: Shirt
results.reviewText: Runs big. Purple/blue color is a bit grey and doesn’t match the matching shorts in the same color. Arm holes could be smaller to reduce running chafe.

luluResponse.responseText: Thank you for sharing your feedback on the Sculpt Tank Top. We hear you on the fit, colour matching, and design details, and appreciate you taking the time to share your experience.

results.title: Nice but
results.reviewText: Nice but i wish it was longer. It is so hard to find a top that actually covers a butt and it is fitted. Will return

luluResponse.responseText: We'd love to help explore our styles and lengths to find a top you love in-store or online via the Contact Us page—we're always here to support.

results.title: Great tank and material just ran a little too long
results.reviewText: Runs long. Prefer the short/crop style of this shirt. 5'3"

results.title: Sizing off
results.reviewText: Sizing is off. I need an in between. Had to send it back.

luluResponse.responseText: Finding that just-right fit matters—and being between sizes can make it a challenge. We appreciate the insight and will keep it top of mind moving forward.

results.title: Grea tank-hardly available
results.reviewText: Really like these tanks but they are hard to get. It doesn’t seem like they are hardly ever in stock which is frustrating. Please make more, especially in the popular colours (e.g., green).

luluResponse.responseText: We hear you're waiting on new colours and restocks for this tank top. To be the first to know when this is restocked and when new colours are added you can sign up for updates online via the Email Sign Up page.

results.title: Great Tank But Wrinkles Too Easily
results.reviewText: The tank itself is great; flowy, breathable material, good fit. However, I had to steam it for the first use and hoped that the fabric would hold. Learned that it has to be steamed or ironed after every wash. I’m not obsessive about wrinkles but it’s virtually unwearable after a wash. This is a miss considering you will likely wash it after each use.

luluResponse.responseText: Honest feedback like yours lets us know where we can make future improvements for a better guest and product experience—thanks for sharing with us.
